description: Rally Workflow API Configuration - Edit this file to add your API keys
instructions: 1. Get an API key from one of these providers:
2. Paste your API key in the 'apiKey' field below
3. Set 'enabled' to true for that provider

sdk.note: Built-in SDK - currently rate limited. Will be used as fallback.

groq.note: FREE 14M tokens/month. Paste your Groq API key here.

gemini.note: FREE 60 req/min. May be region blocked.

deepseek.note: FREE tier available. Good for Chinese/English content.
